tasks.instruction: Use domain search to find and add the cheapest available .com domain containing the keyword "greenbike" that costs under $12 per year, set it to a 1-year registration term, enable privacy protection, and go to the cart.

tasks.instruction: Use domain search to find and add three available domains containing the keyword "devstudio" with TLDs .com, .net, and .io, each priced under $20 per year, and set all three to a 2-year registration term in the cart before checkout.

tasks.instruction: For the .com domain in your account that is configured as forwarding-only, set up root domain forwarding as a permanent (301) redirect to the corresponding https://www.[same-name].io address with masking disabled, then save the rule.
tasks.name: For the .com domain in your account that is configured as forwarding-only, set up root domain forwarding as a permanent (301) redirect to the corresponding https://www.[same-name].io address with masking disabled, then save the rule.

tasks.instruction: For the active .com domain in your account that already has an "api" A record in DNS, remove any existing A records for the root (@) and for "api", then create new A records for those two hosts pointing to specified IP addresses with a TTL of 1 hour.
tasks.name: For the active .com domain in your account that already has an "api" A record in DNS, remove any existing A records for the root (@) and for "api", then create new A records for those two hosts pointing to specified IP addresses with a TTL of 1 hour.

tasks.instruction: For your parked .com domain, enable its parked page using a minimal-ads style template, set a custom "coming soon" headline, restrict ads to the Technology category, set the page language to English, and save.
tasks.name: For your parked .com domain, enable its parked page using a minimal-ads style template, set a custom "coming soon" headline, restrict ads to the Technology category, set the page language to English, and save.

tasks.instruction: For your active .net domain with a 2-year registration term, enable both the add-on that hides WHOIS contact details and the add-on that forwards email addresses, add them to the cart, and proceed without changing the domain’s registration length.

tasks.instruction: Configure renewal settings so that one active .com domain with a 1-year registration term uses annual auto-renew, one active .net domain with a 1-year term uses manual renewal (auto-renew off), and one active .io domain with a 3-year term uses auto-renew for that 3-year period, saving the changes.

tasks.instruction: For the active .com domain that currently has a status subdomain forwarding rule, create three DNS records for subdomains: an A record for "shop" pointing to a specified IP, a CNAME for "blog" pointing to a pages host under the same domain, and an A record for "status" pointing to another specified IP, all with a TTL of 30 minutes.

tasks.instruction: For your parked .org domain, switch its parked page to a no-ads landing template, set a headline indicating the project is archived, add a short description telling visitors how to contact you by email, ensure the parked page is enabled, and save.

parked_page.headline: Project Archived
parked_page.description: This project is archived. You can reach me at contact@oldproject.org
